dl.meta_noscript: Without JavaScript, use the releases page for versioned downloads:
dl.nojs_banner_text: Direct download links and live release metadata load when JavaScript is enabled. Docker and Podman commands further down work as shown. Use the releases link in the next section for versioned installers and wheels.

linux.arch_note: AppImage and DEB: AMD64 / ARM64, RPM: AMD64
linux.appimage_intro: A portable build with no package manager required. Download the architecture you need.
linux.no_appimage: No AppImage assets in latest release.
linux.deb_intro: Debian and Ubuntu packages for both AMD64 and ARM64.
linux.no_deb: No Debian packages in latest release.
linux.rpm_intro: An RPM package for 64-bit x86 systems.
linux.no_rpm: No RPM package in latest release.
linux.arch_intro_before: Build and install manually using our PKGBUILD. This method handles dependencies and integrates with
linux.source_intro: If you want to run MeshChatX from the source code locally:

windows.no_win: No Windows assets in latest release.

python.intro: Install via pip, pipx, Poetry, or uv (includes the built frontend).

android.intro: A standalone Android APK is not yet available.

termux.intro_before: Install on Android via Termux. Install dependencies, then the Python wheel. Run headless with
termux.step2: 2. Install MeshChatX (use latest version from releases)
